highlights.text: It failed Monday evening, and Readers were prepared because for the 1st time in weeks my Bear Case triggered.
I wrote on Monday at 4pm: “Bear case tomorrow: Begins under 6857… I t will probably be 6850 trigger.
Its why bears don’t make money even in bear markets, because ES alternates between elevator down sells, then it short squeezes, and those squeezes are caused by Failed Breakdowns or Level Reclaims.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll discuss a quality example of my core setup: The Failed Breakdown which we had on Friday and gave us the 60+ point run into this weeks highs.

post_title: Bulls Bought The Dip, Is It A Dead Cat Bounce, Or Bottom In? November 6 Plan
